chapters.title: Grey Morning
chapters.content: It was raining all morning. Julia looked outside the window and decided to stay home instead of going to the park.

chapters.title: Movie Time
chapters.content: She made hot tea, prepared popcorn, and chose an old movie to watch. Rainy days always made movies feel better.

chapters.title: Quiet Evening
chapters.content: At night, Julia listened to music while reading a novel. The sound of the rain made everything peaceful.
